prompt: Code review of a TypeScript rate limiting middleware with 3 known security issues: hardcoded secret, IP spoofing vulnerability, and email-based rate limiting collision risk.

assertions.name: flags_hardcoded_secret
assertions.description: Mentions 'secret123' hardcoded value or x-internal-token environment variable issue

assertions.name: flags_ip_spoofing
assertions.description: Notes that x-forwarded-for can be spoofed by clients

assertions.name: has_verdict
assertions.description: Includes a clear verdict (approve / request changes / 🔴)

assertions.name: has_structured_output
assertions.description: Output uses headers (###, ##) or emoji severity markers (🔴, 🟡, 💡)
